skills.name: smart-web-fetch
skills.description: Smart web content fetcher that retrieves URLs as clean Markdown using Jina Reader, markdown.new, defuddle.md, and a basic curl fallback. Use when an agent needs to read a web page, convert HTML to Markdown, reduce token usage, or fetch article-like content from a URL.

commands.command: if echo '{{INPUT}}' | grep -qE '((fetch|read|grab)|(??|??|??)).*https?://'; then URL=$(echo '{{INPUT}}' | grep -oE 'https?://[^ ]+' | head -1); echo 'Detected a web-fetch request; try: smart-web-fetch \"'$URL'\"'; fi
commands.description: Suggest smart-web-fetch when a prompt includes a URL fetch request
